formatted_display: English: Thursday, 14 May 2026 | Nepali: Thursday, 31 Baishakh 2083
quote: We never know how high we are till we are called to rise. Then if we are true to form our statures touch the skies.
formatted_quote: "We never know how high we are till we are called to rise. Then if we are true to form our statures touch the skies." - Emily Dickinson
